title: discopleura capillacea var. nuttallii
intro: Discopleura capillacea var. nuttallii, also known as the Nuttall's discopleura, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nuttall's discopleura include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. Nuttall's discopleura can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used for medicinal purposes.
